reason: solution_uniqueness_guard fails because test_vcr_config_excludes_uri is a text-matching test that requires exact string 'if m != "uri"' — functionally equivalent fixes (e.g., remove() or not in tuple) would fail. Also, behavior_in_task_description (instruction must state exact literals) conflicts with no_solution_leakage (instruction must not state exact strings that are the solution). Tests need rewrite, not instruction.
